description: inspect NIXL/UCX/NCCL transport env vars on a Dynamo recipe (read-only)
rules: read-only: never mutates the cluster, never prints secrets
env subcommand inspects recipe/manifest text only — no kubectl needed
missing disagg-critical vars are a warning, not a failure (may be baked into the image)
usage: Set RECIPE_DIR (a recipe dir recipes/<model>/<framework>/<mode> or a deploy.yaml). Output: interconnect.json. For the node/nixl pod probes, run check_interconnect.py directly with --namespace/--pod.
limitation: Read-only fabric probe; does not run a full pairwise NIXL transfer (needs two scheduled GPU pods + in-pod NIXL test tools). The env check inspects recipe text only — values injected at runtime via initContainers or operator envs are not detected. Single-node agg deployments do not exercise the transport; this is for disagg/multi-node validation.
